exact_approved_public_sentence: Ethos is pre-alpha. It verifies whether AI citations are grounded in document evidence across native Ethos JSON and supported foreign parser outputs.
approval_scope: prepare package publication approval evidence requirements
keep package publication blocked until a dedicated approval decision
keep the approved source snapshot limited to source-snapshot-only use
keep public wording limited to the exact approved pre-alpha sentence
require devrel and decider signoff before any package registry or installable artifact surface
required_evidence: dedicated package publication approval decision record
artifact-specific license and notice bundle review
installation and rollback validation for each artifact family
public-surface posture check for exact changed surfaces
decider signoff on exact artifact names and surfaces
explicit_blockers: installation and rollback validation remains absent
ADR-0005 and H2 source-snapshot closeout do not approve package publication
allowed_wording: Package publication remains blocked pending dedicated approval.
The approved surface is source snapshot only.
Package-related work may be described only as internal blocker preparation.
forbidden_wording: any statement that presents installable artifacts as published or available
any statement that treats the approved source snapshot as a package
any statement that invites public installation from package registries
any statement that expands beyond the exact approved pre-alpha sentence
any statement that implies beta, hosted, or production approval
